textPlain: Every document parser must first answer this question:Why not pandoc  import filter.--The above does not mean: "do not parser outside pandoc". There are reasons not to use pandoc.  It means: Please explain why not. It helps others to choose.

Neat project, nice to see more investment in the AsciiDoc ecosystem. I've shifted my focus to Typst, but I've long liked AsciiDoc as an authoring format.Also TIL about HTMLBook, which looks like a nice subset of HTML for documents.https://oreillymedia.github.io/HTMLBook/
